name: Intervention normalization batch 2 for May 31, 2026
summary: Submitted data-hardening bundle that normalizes seven additional high-linked intervention IDs without changing the underlying evidence records or outlook ratings.

scope.question: Can the next high-linked intervention IDs be promoted as normalized public intervention records while preserving the existing evidence boundaries?

proposed_changes.summary: Create a normalized AAV-hTERT intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The telomerase-restoration public record links a human registry entry to this intervention ID, but the page currently relies on fallback labeling.

proposed_changes.summary: Create a normalized colchicine intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The chronic-inflammation baseline has two promoted low-dose colchicine cardiovascular outcome findings that should resolve to a public intervention profile.

proposed_changes.summary: Create a normalized fasting-mimicking diet intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The autophagy-induction baseline links two promoted FMD biomarker findings and needs a normalized intervention page.

proposed_changes.summary: Create a normalized nicotinamide intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The DNA-repair baseline links mechanistic skin DNA-repair evidence plus positive and null phase 3 skin-cancer prevention trials.

proposed_changes.summary: Create a normalized spermidine intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The autophagy-induction baseline links three spermidine studies and findings, including the null longer-duration memory trial.

proposed_changes.summary: Create a normalized TPE plus IVIG intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The circulating-factor baseline needs a combination intervention record distinct from TPE alone because two promoted findings include IVIG-containing protocols.

proposed_changes.summary: Create a normalized ziltivekimab intervention record.
proposed_changes.rationale: The chronic-inflammation baseline links phase 2 biomarker evidence and an active phase 3 outcomes trial to this intervention ID.

next_actions: Publication complete. Review downstream pages if this change affects shared surfaces.
